title: Three-segment system prompt: static (cached hours) Â· warm/L3 (cached minutes) Â· dynamic (uncached)
depends_on: T-084 (R3 â€” clean router interface required)
current_state: agent/prompt.py::build_system_prompt_split returns (static, dynamic). Anthropic caches the static segment. Dynamic includes session timestamp, L3 context (~300 tokens), awareness snapshot, prefetch, handoff. L3 changes infrequently (typically once per session) but lives in the uncached dynamic segment â€” re-sent at full token cost every turn.
structural_problem: Missed cache opportunity. ~5-10% token waste per turn on L3 content that has not changed.
target_state: Three-segment split: static (consciousness + mode block) cached for hours; warm (L3 context) cached for minutes via second cache_control marker; dynamic (timestamp + awareness + prefetch + handoff) uncached. L3 last-modified timestamp tracked in MemoryTools so the warm segment can be invalidated cleanly when L3 changes.
files_affected: core/providers/anthropic.py (applies cache_control with TTL to both static and warm segments)
tools/tools_memory.py (tracks L3 last_modified_at timestamp; expose via get_l3_context_with_meta)
success_criteria: Anthropic provider applies cache_control to both static and warm segments with appropriate ephemeral cache markers
Measurable token-cost reduction (target 5-10%) on a 20-turn benchmark vs pre-refactor
When L3 is modified mid-session, warm segment correctly invalidates (next turn does not hit stale cache)
risk_notes: Anthropic prompt cache has TTL semantics that can be subtle. Mitigation: log cache hit/miss per turn during rollout; revert if hit rate drops.
migration_plan: 1. Extend MemoryTools with l3_last_modified property (max(updated_at) over l3_cache table)
2. Modify agent/prompt.py::build_system_prompt_split to return 3-tuple; warm = L3 context
3. Modify core/providers/anthropic.py to accept tuple/list system prompt and apply cache_control to each cacheable segment
4. Pass 3-segment system from pi_agent.py::_respond (or unified _respond after R8)
5. Add metrics: log cache_hit / cache_miss / total_tokens per turn to evolution.jsonl
6. Run 20-turn benchmark before and after; record delta in solution entry
resolution: Three-segment prompt split implemented. build_system_prompt_split (agent/prompt.py) returns (static, warm, dynamic): static=consciousness+mode block, warm=L3 context (max 300 tokens), dynamic=session timestamp. Anthropic provider (core/providers/anthropic.py) applies cache_control:ephemeral to both static and warm. pi_agent.py _get_system_prompt_split returns 3-tuple; _respond_via_config unpacks as static_p,warm_p,dynamic_p and passes (static_p,warm_p,dynamic_p) to AnthropicProvider. Handoff/prefetch/session_ctx continue appending to dynamic_p only. verify.py PASS.
